message:
sync beads: add cross-tool daemon sharing architecture to bd-31z

Added architecture diagram showing how xf and cass can share a daemon:
- Each tool bundles its own daemon (works independently)
- Same socket path enables sharing when both installed
- First-come spawns, others connect
- Wire-compatible protocol (either daemon serves both tools)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
